name: Transformation Hooters
description:
(CW: Transformation, Bimbofication, Mental change)
A Hooters restaurant is afflicted by a mysterious curse. Every now and then, a random customer is transformed into a busty, giggly bimbo waitress!
And thanks to its reality-altering effects, no one remembers the difference, or even notices the change in the first place... least of all the brainless, big-titted waitresses themselves~
creator: Orbital_Lithium
